validated_commands.format: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ --fix && .venv/bin/ruff format src/ tests/
validated_commands.lint_check: .venv/bin/ruff check src/ tests/ && .venv/bin/ruff format --check src/ tests/
validated_commands.install_dev: pip install uv && python -m uv sync --extra dev --python /usr/bin/python3.12
validated_commands.notes: Use pip install uv (not curl install). Use python -m uv with --python /usr/bin/python3.12 to avoid PyPy. Baseline 2026-05-08: ~93 failed (7 policy_status ANSI + 2 runtime_factory LLM + 8+ test_skill_bundle YAML parser + 1 test_uninstall_reintegration + 2 workflow tests), 7658 passed.

coverage_baseline.notes: New failures since 05-06: test_skill_bundle.py (8 tests) - YAML parser error 'could not determine constructor for tag None'. test_uninstall_reintegration.py (1). workflow/test_workflow.py (2). These appear to be new regressions in main not caused by TI. compile/cli.py: 51% (183 missing lines).

ansi_note: Rich outputs ANSI codes (italic, bold) even with NO_COLOR=1. Use regex to strip before text assertions.
maintainer_preferences: PRs #1029 (ANSI fix) and #1059 (uninstall engine tests) were closed without merging on 2026-05-03. Be more selective about submitting PRs.

testing_backlog.notes: 8+ new failures in test_skill_bundle.py as of 2026-05-08: YAML 'could not determine constructor for tag None'. Likely a regression in main worth flagging to maintainers.
Large complex file. Core install logic. skip_download logic mocked tests (#552) a good entry point. Deferred.
8 network-gated integration test files need pytestmark annotations before pytest-discovery swap (#1168 gate 1). Offered to help in comment. Await maintainer confirmation.
PR created 2026-05-08 for helper functions. compile() main command (lines 325+) still largely untested.
Helpers covered (PR #1155). update() orchestration lines 746-898 still sparse.
7 tests failing: policy_status uses Rich unicode but test expects ASCII. PR #1029 closed by maintainer - do not retry.
